prompt: A laid-out specimen plate of the three condiment components served alongside Xiao Long Bao: a small ceramic dish of julienned ginger threads, a small dish of dark Zhenjiang black vinegar with a porcelain spoon, and an empty round bamboo steamer disk; the three objects arranged in a triangular composition like separate botanical specimens on the same plate. Rendered as a 1890s botanical specimen plate by Pierre-Joseph Redouté. hand-drawn ink line engraving with minimal watercolor wash. cream-colored aged paper, muted ochre / sepia / olive green tones. Three separate components arranged in a balanced triangular layout on the page, each rendered as if it were an individual specimen, no overlapping; ample negative space between items. no text, no labels, no typography, no captions, no annotations.
